ddls:
CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "naics" INTEGER /* NAICS code for the industry */,
  "occupation_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "soc_code" TEXT /* Standard Occupational Classification (SOC) code */,
  "employment_2020" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in 2020 */,
  "employment_2025" INTEGER /* Projected number of jobs in 2025 */,
  "numerical_change" INTEGER /* Numerical change in jobs between 2020 and 2025 */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in jobs between 2020 and 2025 */,
  "new_jobs" INTEGER /* Projected number of new jobs between 2020 and 2025 */,
  "replacement_jobs" INTEGER /* Projected number of replacement jobs between 2020 and 2025 */,
  "total_jobs" INTEGER /* Total projected number of jobs in 2025 */,
  "median_hourly_wage" REAL /* Median hourly wage for the occupation */,
  "median_annual_wage" REAL /* Median annual wage for the occupation */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education and training level required for the occupation */,
  "job_growth_rate_2020_2025" REAL /* Growth rate of employment from 2020 to 2025 */,
  "job_growth_trend" TEXT /* Descriptive trend (e.g., 'Stable', 'Growing', 'Declining') */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications required for the occupation */,
  "average_years_of_experience" REAL /* Average years of experience required */,
  "job_openings_2020_2025" INTEGER /* Projected number of job openings from 2020 to 2025 */,
  "unemployment_rate_2020" REAL /* Unemployment rate in 2020 */,
  "unemployment_rate_2025" REAL /* Projected unemployment rate in 2025 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_soc_code FOREIGN KEY ("soc_code") REFERENCES soc_codes ("soc_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_naics FOREIGN KEY ("naics") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics" INTEGER /* NAICS code for the industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_growth_rate_2020_2025" REAL /* Growth rate of the industry from 2020 to 2025 */,
  "industry_growth_trend" TEXT /* Descriptive trend (e.g., 'Stable', 'Growing', 'Declining') */,
  "key_indicators" TEXT /* Key performance indicators for the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics")
)

CREATE TABLE "soc_codes" (
  "soc_code" TEXT /* Standard Occupational Classification (SOC) code */,
  "occupation_title" TEXT /* Title of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "occupation_growth_rate_2020_2025" REAL /* Growth rate of the occupation from 2020 to 2025 */,
  "occupation_growth_trend" TEXT /* Descriptive trend (e.g., 'Stable', 'Growing', 'Declining') */,
  "related_occupations" TEXT /* Related occupations that can be considered for career transitions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soc_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "wage_statistics" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "median_hourly_wage" REAL /* Median hourly wage for the occupation */,
  "median_annual_wage" REAL /* Median annual wage for the occupation */,
  "wage_growth_rate_2020_2025" REAL /* Growth rate of median wages from 2020 to 2025 */,
  "wage_growth_trend" TEXT /* Descriptive trend (e.g., 'Stable', 'Growing', 'Declining') */,
  "average_wage_2020" REAL /* Average wage in 2020 */,
  "average_wage_2025" REAL /* Projected average wage in 2025 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education and training level required for the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_years_of_education" REAL /* Average years of education required */,
  "certification_requirements" TEXT /* Additional certification requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, job seeker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., 'basic', 'advanced', 'admin') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
